scenario_description: Agent must reject gap-framing pitch when peer_count=3, then handle CTO's offshore-concern objection without defensive jargon across three turns.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Series B fintech, 35 engineers, no AI integration found in production systems.

required_elements: Turn 3: reframe to engineer quality not location

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming + P-011 Offshore-perception objection (multi-turn coherence under constraint conflict)

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic with clear constraints, ground truth includes actionable elements but tone markers may require subjective interpretation, rubric provides explicit required elements and banned phrases for clear evaluation.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: offshore expertise|circle back|end-to-end excellence|best-in-class|leverage talent|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.
dimensions.check_value: peer_count=3 insufficient for trend|cannot assert sector gap

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
